core_mechanism: reconstructing a meromorphic function from its divisor via a Weierstrass/Hadamard infinite product indexed by the discrete spectrum (eigenvalues/resonances) of a linear operator, so that the zeros and poles are put in exact correspondence with the operator's spectral data plus fixed correction factors
brief_reason: The abstract factorizes the (Selberg zeta) function as a Weierstrass product over the Laplace resonances together with Barnes-G/gamma correction factors, thereby identifying its zeros and poles with the spectral and geometric data of the underlying operator.
